hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE "src/components/[^/]+\.jsx$" && jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"A file under src/components/ was just written. If this is a NEW component (or a behavior change affecting when/how it is used), follow the document-component skill: add its design.md guidelines entry, plus its Table of Contents link and Component Decision Map row. Skip if it is a trivial edit."}}' || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if design.md needs a new component entry
